revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-515

An antenna comprising one primary or fed element and two or more secondary or parasitic elements lying parallel to it in a single plane so as to constitute an end fire array. The usual arrangement of secondary elements consists of one reflector and one or more directors.

Reference: B.S. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
